task_completion.description: Create a forensic case in Autopsy with the specified name and number.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Autopsy GUI showing a new case created with Case Name 'QA_Crossval_2024' and Case Number 'INV-QAV-010'.

task_completion.description: Add the evidence image to the Autopsy case.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Autopsy GUI showing the data source '/home/ga/evidence/ntfs_undel.dd' successfully loaded and analyzed in the tree view.

task_completion.description: Capture recursive file listing and metadata from TSK command-line tools.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Terminal showing TSK commands (e.g., fls, fsstat) being executed on the image, or a text editor showing the saved output at '/home/ga/Reports/tsk_raw_output.txt'.

task_completion.description: Generate a pipe-delimited TSK file inventory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal output showing '/home/ga/Reports/crossval_tsk_inventory.txt' with the exact header 'INODE|ALLOC_STATUS|FILE_TYPE|FULL_PATH|FILENAME' and corresponding file entries.

task_completion.description: Generate a pipe-delimited Autopsy file inventory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal output showing '/home/ga/Reports/crossval_autopsy_inventory.txt' with the exact header 'INODE|ALLOC_STATUS|FILE_TYPE|FULL_PATH|FILENAME' and corresponding file entries derived from Autopsy.

task_completion.description: Produce the first 6 sections of the cross-validation report.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor showing '/home/ga/Reports/crossval_report.txt' containing sections 1-6: IMAGE_METADATA, TSK_FILE_COUNT, AUTOPSY_FILE_COUNT, TSK_ALLOCATED / TSK_DELETED, AUTOPSY_ALLOCATED / AUTOPSY_DELETED, and DISCREPANCIES.

task_completion.description: Produce the hash verifications and conclusion sections of the cross-validation report.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor showing '/home/ga/Reports/crossval_report.txt' containing section 7 (HASH_VERIFICATIONS) with at least 3 lines formatted as 'INODE <n>: <filename> MD5=<hash> MATCH=YES/NO', and section 8 (QA_CONCLUSION) stating either VERIFIED or DISCREPANCIES_FOUND.

integrity.description: Verify the agent actually used the Autopsy GUI to analyze the image.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent interacting with the Autopsy application interface (e.g., browsing the file system, viewing file metadata/hashes) rather than just fabricating the Autopsy inventory file from a script.

integrity.description: Verify the agent actually executed TSK commands in the terminal.
integrity.visual_evidence: Terminal history should show commands like 'fls', 'ils', 'fsstat', or 'icat' being run against the ntfs_undel.dd image.

integrity.description: Verify the agent actually checked file hashes in both tools.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent viewing MD5 hashes in the Autopsy GUI and calculating hashes in the terminal (e.g., using 'icat' piped to 'md5sum') to perform a real comparison.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Expected Case Name: QA_Crossval_2024. Expected Disk Image: /home/ga/evidence/ntfs_undel.dd. Required Output Paths: /home/ga/Reports/tsk_raw_output.txt, /home/ga/Reports/crossval_tsk_inventory.txt, /home/ga/Reports/crossval_autopsy_inventory.txt, and /home/ga/Reports/crossval_report.txt.
